mnemonics: FRAME AI FOR GOOD: Fairness, Responsibility, Accountability, Mitigation of harm, Ethics, Accessibility, Inclusivity, Governance, Oversight, Openness, Design for all
keyPoints: Define 'Social Good' with clear, measurable, and context-specific objectives for the AI system.
Implement multi-stakeholder participatory design processes that include diverse and marginalized voices.
Establish continuous monitoring and auditing frameworks to assess real-world impact and ensure accountability.
commonMistakes: Optimizing for a single, narrow metric of success (e.g., raw accuracy) without considering broader societal impacts and trade-offs.
Treating 'fairness' as a one-time technical fix rather than an ongoing process of governance and stakeholder engagement.
Designing AI systems in a vacuum without considering the existing social, economic, and political systems they will be deployed into.
